mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRAINING_CATEGORY WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND large_category_idx = #{large_category_idx} AND group_idx = #{group_idx} AND delete_yn = 'N'
AND ${search_type} LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'
ORDER BY print_seq DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE TRAINING_CATEGORY SET GROUP_IDX = #{group_idx}, CATEGORY_NAME = #{category_name}, PRINT_SEQ = #{print_seq}, USE_YN = #{use_yn}, MOD_DATE = SYSDATE, MOD_ID = #{mod_id}, req_limit_yn = #{req_limit_yn}, req_limit_type = #{req_limit_type}, req_limit_count = #{req_limit_count} WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND large_category_idx = #{large_category_idx} AND group_idx = #{group_idx} AND category_idx = #{category_idx} AND delete_yn = 'N'
